item.description:
Release v4.13.0

Changes since v4.12.0

  • bugfix: fix a bug
  • docs: add NSCollectionView native rendering design for EditorFileTree
  • feat: add emptyResponse error case to LLM provider support
  • feat: add logger to all plugins
  • feat: add raw stream chunk logging for StepFun provider
  • feat: add thinking popover button to message header
  • feat: migrate legacy PluginPolicy to LumiPluginPolicy
  • feat: persist and display LLM reasoning content in history
  • feat: show turn duration in completed turn divider
  • feat: StepFun empty-response retry and support-error passthrough
  • feat(assistant): show model reasoning in message bubble
  • feat(conversation-list): improve error handling and localization
  • feat(conversation-list): show unread count on toolbar button
  • feat(core): add LumiLayoutState and LumiCore.layoutState
  • feat(core): upgrade LumiLayoutState logs to SuperLog format
  • feat(core/plugin): extend LumiPlugin protocol with editor/contributions APIs, delegate lifecycle to services, and disable GitHubPlugin by default
  • feat(i18n): add Localizable.xcstrings for 5 framework packages
  • feat(i18n): unify localization rules for packages and plugins
  • feat(layout): add trailing borders and fix ActivityBar layout
  • feat(layout): sync ActivityBar selection to LumiCore.layoutState
